body:
<!-- Thanks so much for your PR, your contribution is appreciated! ❤️ -->

Fixes #2525

- `NavigationMenu.List` is `<ul>`
- `NavigationMenu.Item` is `<li>`
- `NavigationMenu.Link` receives `active` prop to specify `aria-current="page"`

Should we mark this PR as breaking since people can have visual regressions if they don't update there CSS with `list-style: none;`?

labels.name: breaking change
labels.description: Introduces changes that are not backward compatible.

labels.name: component: navigation menu
labels.description: Changes related to the navigation menu component.

title: [navigation menu] Semantic element structure and `active` page prop
